mapper.select: select system_name, version, copyright, contact_info, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from system_info where config_key = 'default' and deleted = false
mapper.update: update system_info set system_name = #{systemName}, version = #{version}, copyright = #{copyright}, contact_info = #{contactInfo}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where config_key = 'default' and deleted = false
